column1: # OWASP ZAP — False-positive suppression rules for VoyageAI
# 10055   IGNORE  CSP is set at Vercel edge layer (X-Content-Type-Options, etc.)
#                 — not visible when ZAP hits the origin
# 10096   IGNORE  Timestamp disclosure in /api/health is intentional
# 10038   IGNORE  CSP "unsafe-inline" is required by Next.js inline styles
#                 and is mitigated by nonce rotation — acceptable for staging
# 10021   IGNORE  X-Content-Type-Options is set at CDN, not origin
# 10035   IGNORE  Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS) is enforced by Vercel CDN
# 90022   IGNORE  App framework version disclosure (Next.js) — low priority

column3: CSP managed at Vercel edge CDN layer
HSTS enforced at Vercel CDN level
